title: Savory Mediterranean Vegetable Stir-fry
description: A savory and tender mediterranean dish featuring a blend of vegetables flavored with malt vinegar for an adventurous twist, ideal as a side or light meal.

ingredients.name: Bell peppers
ingredients.notes: Red and orange for color contrast

ingredients.name: Tomatoes
ingredients.amount: 2 cups halved fresh or 1 can crushed

ingredients.name: Malt vinegar
ingredients.amount: 2 tablespoons (or substitute with apple cider vinegar)
ingredients.notes: Adds a zingy flavor to balance flavors

ingredients.name: Red pepper flakes
ingredients.notes: To add a touch of heat if preferred

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add onions, minced garlic (if using), and red bell peppers to the hot skillet. Cook for about 2 minutes.
Add zucchini and eggplant, stir occasionally until lightly browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Toss in halved tomatoes and oregano leaves. Mix well with vegetables.
Pour in malt vinegar (or apple cider vinegar), salt, pepper, and red pepper flakes (if using).
Stir well to combine and let the mixture cook for another 2 minutes until the vegetables are tender but still slightly crisp.
Remove from heat and serve immediately. Can be garnished with fresh herbs like dill or parsley if desired.
